node.text: Sam had a health scare last weekend and ended up in the ER with gastritis.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "digestive issue health") on Session 14 (Score: 1.00)

node.text: Sam has been dealing with discomfort that has been limiting their movement and has been trying to make changes in their diet.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "digestive issue health") on Session 17 (Score: 0.72)

node.text: Sam realized the importance of prioritizing health by adopting a more nutritious diet and getting regular exercise after the health scare.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "digestive issue health") on Session 14 (Score: 1.00)

node.text: Sam is on a diet and determined to live healthier.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "digestive issue health") on Session 8 (Score: 0.67)

node.text: Sam has been stressed with phone issues on top of the health scare.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "digestive issue health") on Session 14 (Score: 1.00)

node.text: Sam is trying to eat healthier and recently trying to eat less processed food, but has made no changes yet.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "digestive issue health") on Session 3 (Score: 0.53)

node.text: Sam agreed to give swapping soda for flavored seltzer water and candy for dark chocolate a try.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "digestive issue health") on Session 3 (Score: 0.53)

node.text: Sam still enjoys soda and candy, although knowing it's not the best habit.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "digestive issue health") on Session 3 (Score: 0.53)

node.text: Sam acknowledges that dealing with health issues can take away from enjoyable experiences.

node.text: Sam is interested in ordering something similar to what Evan uses to prioritize health.
